violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Raw animal foods (such as liquid egg whites) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as baked goods) in the bakery 1-door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Establishment was observed to be vacuum sealing beef. Establishment is to stop vacuum sealing meats till HACCP plan and Variance letter are in place. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils between uses shall be maintained in one of the following manners: in water that is maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more, in water with sufficient flow to flush particulates to the drain, or on a dry clean surface. Utensils were cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection and placed on a dry clean surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
